name: Creole Pork Chops
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown pork chops on both sides in 1-1/2 tablespoons hot oil in a skillet; drain chops and discard drippings.
2. Add 1-1/2 tablespoons oil to the skillet.
3. Saute onions and garlic for 3 minutes.
4. Add green pepper and saute for 1 minute.
5. Add wine and bring to a boil, stirring to deglaze the skillet.
6. Return chops to the skillet and spoon sauce over the chops.
7. Add tomatoes, lemon juice, seasonings, and enough water to cover the chops if necessary.
8. Simmer, lightly covered, for 1 hour or until chops are tender, turning occasionally.
9. Remove chops to a warming platter.
10. Remove bay leaf.
11. Cook sauce over high heat until thickened to desired consistency.
12. Spoon sauce over chops and serve over rice.
